axes.name: CLI invocation
axes.note: All 17 GNU m4 1.4.21 flags wired. 1 permanent non-claim: POSIX signals.

axes.name: Byte model
axes.note: Eight-bit-clean. Byte-exact verified: ASCII, high bytes, UTF-8, control chars, tabs.

axes.name: Lexer
axes.note: Multi-byte delimiter lexer. Same-pass changequote re-lex (M4.QUOTE.DEEP.1).

axes.name: Quoting
axes.note: Quote nesting, delimiter changes, same-pass timing via token re-lex. Empty-quote concat.

axes.name: Comments
axes.note: changecom, dnl. changecom excluded from same-pass re-lex (matches GNU m4).

axes.name: Macro definitions
axes.note: define/undefine, builtin copy via defn. pushdef/popdef stacks.

axes.name: Expansion
axes.note: $n/$@/$*/$#/$0 substitution. Rescanning. forloop/self-ref/mutual-recursion FIXED. Pure-text fast path.

axes.name: Arguments
axes.note: Nested parens, quoted commas, expansion during collection. $n resolution.

axes.name: Text builtins
axes.note: len, index, substr, translit, regexp, patsubst, format — all oracle-admitted.

axes.name: Arithmetic builtins
axes.note: eval (32-bit signed, all GNU operators), incr, decr. 10 Kani proofs.

axes.name: Diversions
axes.note: divert, undivert, divnum, negative discard, EOF auto-undivert, file undivert.

axes.name: File inclusion
axes.note: include, sinclude, -I search path, directory-of-including-file logic.

axes.name: Diagnostics
axes.note: errprint/__file__/__line__/m4exit working. Byte-exact wording not claimed (CROSS.7).

axes.name: Debug/trace
axes.note: traceon, traceoff, debugmode, debugfile, dumpdef, -d flags, -t name.

axes.name: Shell builtins
axes.note: syscmd, esyscmd, sysval working. Sandboxed. fd inheritance (CROSS.12), signal encoding (CROSS.34).

axes.name: Frozen files
axes.note: -F/-R cross-compatible with GNU m4 1.4.21. 8 oracle smoke tests. V1 two-line format.

axes.name: Autoconf
axes.note: 10 AC_DEFUN-pattern seed fixtures pass. Full Autoconf not claimed.

axes.name: Hostile input
axes.note: Panic-free on malformed input, deep nesting, binary bytes, huge defs, missing files.

axes.name: Fuzzing
axes.note: 1M deterministic fuzz: 0 panics. 3 libfuzzer targets. 10 Kani proofs.
